productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Grey Top
description: Composition Grey boat neck top made of 100% cotton, has poet's sleeves with a band at the cuff, graphic print with silver stitch detailing on the front and band on the hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Revel in the subtlety of femininity in this soft grey top from the united colors of benetton. The contoured and coloured graphic print of clothes and shoes adds that feminine touch, while the boat neck flatters all body shapes. Team this with jeans or skirts and sandals. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5.8” and chest 33"
